case_title: NAGI MEHAMED DAOMAH VS. CALIFORNIA PARKING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2010, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, BOTH EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAOMAH, NAGI MEHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE COSTS OF REPAIR EXCEEDS THE VALUE OF THE SUBJECT CAR. DAMAGES ARE BASED ON THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
